text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "GITHUB_TOKEN is read from environment in skill_fetcher.md, explicitly passed through shared context to skill_reporter.md, and directly embedded in the Authorization header of an HTTP POST request to an external GitHub API endpoint without any redaction or sanitization.",
  "trace": "skill_fetcher.md reads GITHUB_TOKEN from the environment and stores it in shared agent context (line 2 of Behavior). skill_reporter.md retrieves GITHUB_TOKEN from shared context (Inputs section) and uses it directly in the curl command: -H \"Authorization: token $GITHUB_TOKEN\" (line 2 of Behavior). The HTTP POST is sent to https://api.github.com/repos/org/repo/issues/$PR_NUMBER/comments, which is an external endpoint outside the organization's direct control. The credential value flows unmodified from environment → shared context → HTTP Authorization header → external GitHub API."
}
```
